nasb.text: It is good that you grasp one thing and also not let go of the other; for the one who fears God comes forth with both of them.

esv.text: It is good that you should take hold of this, and from that withhold not your hand, for the one who fears God shall come out from both of them.

cnv.text: 持守這個是好的，那個也不要放鬆，因為敬畏　神的人，都必避免這兩個極端。

ccb.text: 最好是持守这个教训也不放松那个教训，因为敬畏上帝的人必避免两个极端。

csbs.text: 你抓住这个是好的，也不要放手那个；因为敬畏神的人，能兼顾这两者。
